## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Experiment script
- [ ] Analysis/reporting logic
- [ ] Other

## Validation

- [ ] Ran `bash exp1-baseline.sh`
- [ ] Ran `bash exp2-cache-hit.sh`
- [ ] Ran `python3 analyze.py` on resulting OTel file(s)
- [ ] Updated docs where needed

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is scoped and reproducible
- [ ] No secrets or credentials added
- [ ] Backward compatibility impact considered
